name: Allegany First
description_short: Allegany First Federal Credit Union is a member-owned financial institution in Fillmore, NY offering checking, savings, loans, and digital banking services with competitive rates.
description_long:
Allegany First Federal Credit Union operates as a traditional credit union serving the Fillmore, New York area since its founding. As a member-owned institution, it provides standard banking services including checking and savings accounts, various loan products, and digital banking access. The credit union emphasizes accessibility through surcharge-free ATM networks and modern digital tools.

The institution offers a comprehensive range of financial products including car loans (starting at 3.00% APR), unsecured personal loans (starting at 6.49% APR), and recreational loans (starting at 5.50% APR). Members gain access to online and mobile banking platforms for iOS and Android, bill pay services with no monthly fees or transaction limits, and digital wallet support through Apple Pay, Google Pay, and Samsung Pay. The credit union also provides instant-issue temporary debit cards for new accounts and card replacements, though these carry a $10 fee per card.

Allegany First distinguishes itself through its Allpoint ATM network providing surcharge-free cash access nationwide and internationally, and its commitment to fee-free bill payment services. The institution offers member assistance for debit card issues 24/7 and provides online financial calculators. Their marketing emphasizes competitive rates and convenient digital access for members managing finances remotely.

As a smaller regional credit union, Allegany First serves a limited geographic member base despite offering some national services through ATM networks. The organization maintains traditional branch hours (Monday-Thursday 9am-4pm, Friday 9am-6pm) and operates from a single physical location. Members should note that debit cards cannot be used for car rentals, which may limit convenience for traveling members. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Unsecured personal loans (6.49% APR starting rate)
Online and mobile banking (iOS and Android)
Fee-free online bill pay with unlimited payees
Digital wallet services (Apple Pay, Google Pay, Samsung Pay)
Debit cards with instant-issue temporary option ($10 fee)
E-statements and check deposit through mobile app
pros: Car loan rates starting at 3.00% APR with promotional Winter Loan Sale
Surcharge-free Allpoint ATM access throughout the US and internationally
Fee-free online bill pay with unlimited payees and no per-transaction charges
Instant-issue temporary debit cards available same-day for immediate use
Digital wallet support including Apple Pay, Google Pay, and Samsung Pay
24/7 debit card member assistance for lost/stolen cards and fraud reporting
No monthly fees for online bill pay service
cons: Debit cards cannot be used for car rentals, limiting travel flexibility
$10 fee charged per instant-issue temporary debit card
Single physical branch location limits in-person access to Fillmore, NY area only
Limited branch hours (closes at 4pm most weekdays)
Website login error indicates potential technical issues with online banking platform
best_for: Local Fillmore, NY residents seeking competitive loan rates and member-owned banking
Frequent travelers wanting surcharge-free ATM access worldwide
Borrowers shopping for car loans and recreational vehicle financing
Members preferring fee-free bill pay and digital banking convenience
diagnosis: Allegany First Federal Credit Union is best for local Fillmore, NY residents and regional members seeking competitive loan rates and convenient digital banking from a member-owned institution. The primary caveat is its single-branch limitation and the critical restriction that debit cards cannot be used for car rentals, which may significantly inconvenience traveling members despite their otherwise strong ATM access through Allpoint.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
